EXECUTION_POLICIES:
**Delegation**: - One subagent per step; multiple delegations → use status "continue" with new step - Evidence contains deliverable → status "done" (no redundant step) - Asking user for clarification → status "done" (terminal action, await input)
**Granularity**: - 1-3 steps per decision, each with checkable expected_output - Step descriptions: imperative tool actions (not raw goal string) - Merge related filesystem reads into single step
